Constituency Office Leave a Message: 02477672089 Parliamentary Office House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Phone: 02072 195 842 Contact Hours: 10am - 5pm Email taiwo.owatemi.mp@parliament.uk Join the team - Volunteer with us Volunteer Form Work experience Programme Learn more and apply here Contact me Fill out your details here and we’ll get back to you within 24 hours. First Name* Last Name* Phone Number* Email Address* Address* Postcode* Message Submit let’s talk Book one of my surgery appointments If you want to book an appointment to discuss any issues that matter to you that I can help with, please complete the form below. Contact us This is the official website of Taiwo Owatemi, MP for Coventry North West. Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To find out if I am your MP click here. quick links Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Homepage About Me Help & Advice My Work News & Updates Contact Me Office Policies Contact Info Constituency Office: 02477 672089 taiwo.owatemi.mp@parliament.uk join My Newsletter Sign up for my newsletter to enjoy updates on Labour policy, my campaigns, and the recent work I’ve been doing in Westminster and Coventry. Sign Me Up © 2025 Taiwo Owatemi. All Rights Reserved. Facebook-f Twitter Linkedin-in Instagram Youtube Sign up to my newsletter Want to know what MPs actually get up to? Sign up to my newsletter to receive monthly updates on the work that I’ve been doing in the constituency and in Westminster. I also provide updates on key Government policies so you can keep up to date on that too! Full Name* Phone Number* Address* Postcode* Email* What made you want to subscribe?
